ItacAcademyItem.Name: Peripatetici (Accademia dei)
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: A publication related to this Academy, but not held in British Library collections, is Gabriele Lazari, tesi di naturale filosofia sostenuta publicamente a nove marzo 1630.
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
